news.title: Google just gave Sundar Pichai a $692M pay package
news.summary: Most of it is tied to performance, including new stock incentives linked to Waymo and Wing, its drone delivery venture.

news.title: Grammarly’s ‘expert review’ is just missing the actual experts
news.summary: A recently-added feature in Grammarly purports to improve users’ writing with help from the world's great writers and thinkers — and some tech journalists, too.

news.title: OpenAI robotics lead Caitlin Kalinowski quits in response to Pentagon deal
news.summary: Hardware executive Caitlin Kalinowski announced today that in response to OpenAI's controversial agreement with the Department of Defense, she’s resigned from her role leading the company's robotics team.

news.title: OpenAI delays ChatGPT’s ‘adult mode’ again
news.summary: The feature, which will give verified adult users access to erotica and other adult content, had already been delayed from December.

news.title: Sony appears to be testing dynamic pricing on PlayStation games
news.summary: A site called PSprices has been tracking prices on Sony's digital game store and noticed something unusual: some games were being offered at different prices to different users. What's more, those offers are tracked in the PlayStation API with experiment identifiers like IPT_PILOT and IPT_OPR_TESTIN

news.title: Vizio accounts are becoming Walmart accounts
news.summary: Walmart bought Vizio in 2024, and now it's taking the next steps to formally fold the TV maker into itself by phasing out Vizio accounts.
